title: Kip Drop Cloths Pre-Taped Painters Masking Film 2600mm x 25m, Masker Masking Tape with Plastic Sheet, Drape for Spraying, Covering, Suitable for Decorating, Automotive, Windows Dust & Paint Protection
features: Masking Tape with environmentally friendly PE film.
The film attaches itself to the substrate through static charge.
For quick and full covering and masking of large surface areas.
Ideal for masking walls, windows, doors and furniture.
Can be applied up to 4 days before use. For best results remove immediately after painting.
description: From the manufacturer Kip is responsible for quality Kip adhesive tapes have been successfully represented on the market for more than 40 years . Our proximity to the craft has enabled us to develop innovations and convert them into high-quality products. Indispensable for craftsmen Whether masking tape, fabric tape or protective film: Our range of adhesive tapes offers professional solutions for painters, plasterers and the construction industry. All adhesive tapes are subject to strict quality controls. Tips & tricks - for a good end result & good adhesion Check the substrate for suitability In order to achieve a good end result and good adhesion, the surface should be free of grease, moisture, oil and dust. Test the surface with a test application Stick the tape firmly to the surface and remove it after a while. This is how you can find out which tape adheres best to your surface. Note: We generally advise against masking on marble and natural stone. Storage In order to be able to use your Kip adhesive tapes as long as possible, they should be stored in a cool and dry place! Remove the tape There are two tips for removing adhesive tape: The adhesive tape should be removed at an angle of 45 ° before the paint is fully dry and never removed suddenly. 1 Day Crepe 5 Day Crepe Premium Washi Tec Low Tack Washi Tec Outdoor Washi-Tec Drop Cloth Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.4 out of 5 stars 760 4.4 out of 5 stars 760 4.4 out of 5 stars 760 4.4 out of 5 stars 760 4.4 out of 5 stars 760 4.4 out of 5 stars 3,038 Price £2.26 £ 2 . 26 £5.93 £ 5 . 93 £8.11 £ 8 . 11 £11.49 £ 11 . 49 £14.45 £ 14 . 45 £14.60 £ 14 . 60 no data no data no data no data no data no data
